item.title: Name Di-confusion
item.description: This is my first post and instead of a proper introduction, I would like to clarify my name’s situation. I intend do that bacause many non-Greek friends and colleagues get confused since my name is different on official documents than how I normally write it. The situation Formal and informal I’m baptised in a Greek Orthodox Christian church (not my choice 😄) as Ιωάννης which directly translates to English as Ioannis.
